qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_entrega as oi_mot_entrega, t0.c_mot_entrega as c_mot_entrega, t0.d_mot_entrega as d_mot_entrega, SEC.policy, t0.c_mot_entrega as CODE, t0.d_mot_entrega as TEXT FROM PER37_MOT_ENTREGA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Entrega.MOT_ENTREGA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_entrega LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_entrega asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_entrega as oi_mot_entrega, SEC.policy FROM PER37_MOT_ENTREGA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Entrega.MOT_ENTREGA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_entrega LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_entrega asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Entrega.MOT_ENTREGA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Entrega.MOT_ENTREGA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.oi_mot_entrega) as CNT from PER37_MOT_ENTREGA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.oi_mot_entrega={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.d_mot_entrega,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.c_mot_entrega,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
